{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 3.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-281", "name": "Improper Preservation of Permissions"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-r9hw-mj3w-phcq. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
The mknod utility in uutils coreutils fails to handle security labels atomically by creating device nodes before setting the SELinux context. If labeling fails, the utility attempts cleanup using std::fs::remove_dir, which cannot remove device nodes or FIFOs. This leaves mislabeled nodes behind with incorrect default contexts, potentially allowing unauthorized access to device nodes that should have been restricted by mandatory access controls.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-79rc-qpw3-jv92", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:29:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-79rc-qpw3-jv92", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-79rc-qpw3-jv92"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35361", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/10582", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.6.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/42b2ad83cdcf6e959ecb378c5040c60d9c64becf", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-79rc-qpw3-jv92"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has an Improper Preservation of Permissions issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T21:53:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-79rc-qpw3-jv92", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T21:53:56Z"}
